assessment_objectives.objective: access agreements are developed and documented for organizational systems.
individuals requiring access to organizational information and systems sign appropriate access agreements prior to being granted access.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and any time there is a change to the user's level of access

assessment_objectives.objective: individuals requiring access to organizational information and systems re-sign access agreements to maintain access to organizational systems when access agreements have been updated or frequency.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and any time there is a change to the user's level of access

assessment_objectives.objective: the frequency at which to review / update access agreements is defined.
assessment_objectives.scf_defined_parameters: at least annually and any time there is a change to the user's level of access

assessment_objectives.objective: the frequency at which to re-sign access agreements to maintain access to organizational information is defined.

assessment_objectives.objective: the access agreements are reviewed / updated frequently.
